nasb.text: Then the priest shall take the basket from your hand and set it down before the altar of the Lord your God.

esv.text: Then the priest shall take the basket from your hand and set it down before the altar of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 祭司就要從你手裡接過籃子，放在耶和華你的　神的祭壇前面。

ccb.text: 祭司要从你们手中接过篮子，放在你们的上帝耶和华的祭坛前。
